all four chains solved to residual < 1e-9
BDM ANCHOR GATE (G_LR, 126bar case): two-loop BDM give n1 = 9.5, nU = 16.2, alpha_U^-1 = 45.5; the one-loop solver must land within (1.0, 0.7, 3.0) of those
BDM anchor gate (2L1R4C): nU ~ 14.4-14.6 (their XIIa) within 0.8

the 2L1R4C chain is DEAD by proton decay (BDM's own conclusion reproduced with the current bound)
TESTABILITY: the living chain(s) sit within reach of the Hyper-K e+ pi0 program (tau not far above 1e35 yr) -- the rescue is falsifiable, not a retreat to invisibility

seesaw ceiling DISCLOSED: the archival M_R spectrum (SUSY-convention, indicative only) vs M_I -- the heaviest state needs f = M_R3/M_I; f >> 4pi signals that the non-SUSY flavor refit (DYN-9b) must lower the M_R ceiling or raise M_I

leptogenesis compatibility DISCLOSED per living chain (archival M_1 = 2.4e10 GeV vs M_I): chains with low M_I strain both the seesaw ceiling and thermal N_1 production; PS-type chains with higher M_I are friendlier

the 210-COMPATIBLE PS chain (no D) is MARGINAL, not dead: within 10x of the current bound, i.e. inside BDM's own GUT-threshold spread caveat -- the framework's 210 source is not excluded in the non-SUSY lane

derivation_log.anchors: BDM PRD 80 015013 (arXiv:0903.4049) p.14 effective two-step results
derivation_log.b_formula: b = -(11/3)C_A + (2/3) sum_Weyl T + (1/3) sum_cplx T; abelian: GUT-normalized (T15 of SU(4); sqrt(3/8)(B-L)); all coefficients derived from content and gated against hand values
derivation_log.matching: 1/a1 = (3/5)/a2R + (2/5)/a_BLnorm (LR) or +(2/5)/a4 (PS); a3 = a4 or a3c; Newton on (ln M_I, ln M_X, split) demanding four-coupling unification
derivation_log.running: SM segment two-loop; intermediate segment one-loop (BDM two-loop shifts exponents O(0.1-1): flagged)
derivation_log.tau_d6: 1.6e34 yr (M_X/1e16)^4 (alpha_G^-1/25)^2; current bound SK p -> e+ pi0 2.4e34 yr; Hyper-K reach ~1e35

framework_notes.kinematic_core: the reconstruction's theorem core (16 with forced nu^c, N = 3 from aut(CP1), K_tr = Killing) is SUSY-AGNOSTIC: untouched
framework_notes.p_nuc_source: the 126bar survives as the post-B-L P_nu^c source in every chain considered
framework_notes.route_b_language: the hidden-messenger SUPERpotential argument needs non-SUSY re-derivation; the K_tr direction uniqueness (representation theory) survives as-is
framework_notes.source_swap_flag: BDM's minimal G_LR realization uses 45_H for the first stage where the framework's companion note uses 210_H: a conditional-input swap to be audited in DYN-9b (210-based PS chain computed here as the alternative)
